_comment: Task->workflow decision guide for AI agents and new admins. Validated by scripts/generate-workflow-catalog.py --check (every workflow number must exist in the catalog). safeFirst = the read-only workflow to run before the action.

intents.intent: Check a domain's overall health / status across systems
intents.notes: Read-only aggregator (CF + M365). Start here for any domain request.

intents.intent: Onboard a domain whose registrar is external (eNOM): use FFC Cloudflare DNS
intents.notes: Creates the CF zone and repoints nameservers at eNOM via WHMCS. Gated write.

intents.intent: Apply the standard DNS configuration to a domain
intents.notes: 103 = GitHub apex + M365 records; 106 = DNS-only. Both dry-run by default.

intents.intent: Add, change, or delete one DNS record
intents.notes: Dry-run default; also issue-label triggered.

intents.intent: Audit DNS compliance / export zones for review
intents.notes: All read-only reports.

intents.intent: Create a redirect from one domain to another
intents.notes: Idempotent Cloudflare Single Redirect rule; dry-run default.

intents.intent: Register a brand-new domain at Cloudflare Registrar
intents.notes: check-only mode first; live purchase needs mode=execute-register + typed confirm_domain.

intents.intent: Transfer an existing eNOM domain to Cloudflare Registrar
intents.notes: Preflight report -> EPP/auth-code probe -> post-transfer verification. See project #157.

intents.intent: Provision a complete new charity website (repo + DNS + Pages)
intents.notes: Issue-assigned trigger or dispatch; environment-gated DNS + repo jobs.

intents.intent: Deploy a static clone of an existing site into an FFC-EX repo
intents.notes: Serialized; writes to the target repo.

intents.intent: Onboard a charity into WHMCS (client + contacts + order)
intents.notes: Product/custom-field ids come from the products export. Dry-run default.

intents.intent: Open, reply to, or triage WHMCS support tickets
intents.notes: 209/208 are read-only triage/export; replies (207) are templated + human-gated.

intents.intent: Review or act on WHMCS orders
intents.notes: 210 read-only triage; 211 accepts/cancels one order, dry-run default.

intents.intent: Check M365 email/DNS readiness or enable DKIM for a domain
intents.notes: 301/302 read-only; 304/305 write (gated).

intents.intent: Export Zeffy campaigns / payments / contacts
intents.notes: Read-only; donor PII masked by default on this public repo.

intents.intent: Verify Google API connectivity (GA4)
intents.notes: Read-only smoke; reusable gate via workflow_call.

intents.intent: Generate the GA traffic reports for the primary sites
intents.notes: Read-only; delivers JSON to ffcadmin via PR.

intents.intent: Set up GTM + default tags for a new charity site
intents.notes: Per-charity container model; dry-run default; google-prod-write gated.

intents.intent: Back up all GTM containers
intents.notes: Read-only weekly export; artifacts 90d.

intents.intent: Audit Key Vault secrets for placeholders / staleness
intents.notes: Read-only; values never printed.

intents.intent: See automation platform health (runs, success rates)
intents.notes: Read-only 30d Actions metrics artifact.

intents.intent: Add a collaborator to an FFC repo
intents.notes: CAUTION: dry_run defaults to FALSE on this one (documented exception); github-prod gated.
